name: AI Social Media Content Generator and Publisher
description: Takes a topic and target platforms, researches trending content via Exa, generates platform-optimized posts using Claude AI for multiple social networks, logs all content to Google Sheets, and sends drafts to Slack for review.

source.originalName: Social media content generator and publisher | X, Linkedin

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for content research

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for content log

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for content review

topic.description: Topic or subject to generate social media posts about

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for content log

steps.name: Build Exa query for trending content research
Build Claude prompt for multi-platform content generation
Generate social media content with Claude AI
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build rows for content log in Google Sheets
Build Slack review message with all posts
Send content to Slack for review
